channel.title: Cant run package.json scripts
channel.description:
Hi. I was following the documentation to install frontity. After that, when I run npx frontity dev I get this errors:
SERVER STARTED -- Listening @ http://localhost:3000 - mode: development - target: module - public-path: /static/
Error: ./node_modules/@frontity/core/src/utils/merge-packages.ts Module build failed (from ./node_modules/babel-loader/lib/index.js): SyntaxError: /media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/frontity/front/node_modules/@frontity/core/src/utils/merge-packages.ts: Unexpected token (17:18)
15 | packages, 16 | state, > 17 | overwriteArrays = false, | ^ 18 | }: { 19 | packages: { 20 | [name: string]: Package | PackageFunction; at Object._raise (/media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/frontity/front/node_modules/@babel/parser/src/parser/error.js:60:45) at Object.raiseWithData (/media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/frontity/front/node_modules/@babel/parser/src/parser/error.js:55:17) at Object.raise (/media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/frontity/front/node_modules/@babel/parser/src/parser/error.js:39:17) at Object.unexpected (/media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/frontity/front/node_modules/@babel/parser/src/parser/util.js:139:16) at Object.checkExpressionErrors (/media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/frontity/front/node_modules/@babel/parser/src/parser/util.js:241:12) at Object.parseParenAndDistinguishExpression (/media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/frontity/front/node_modules/@babel/parser/src/parser/expression.js:1484:10) at Object.parseExprAtom (/media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/frontity/front/node_modules/@babel/parser/src/parser/expression.js:1071:21) at Object.parseExprSubscripts (/media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/frontity/front/node_modules/@babel/parser/src/parser/expression.js:563:23) at Object.parseUpdate (/media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/frontity/front/node_modules/@babel/parser/src/parser/expression.js:543:21) at Object.parseMaybeUnary (/media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/frontity/front/node_modules/@babel/parser/src/parser/expression.js:527:17) @ ./node_modules/@frontity/core/src/client/store.ts 1:43-94 1:187-200 @ ./node_modules/@frontity/core/src/client/index.tsx @ ./build/bundling/entry-points/front/client.ts @ multi webpack-hot-middleware/client ./build/bundling/entry-points/front/client.ts
./node_modules/@frontity/html2react/src/libraries/component.tsx Module build failed (from ./node_modules/babel-loader/lib/index.js): SyntaxError: /media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/frontity/front/node_modules/@frontity/html2react/src/libraries/component.tsx: Unexpected token, expected ";" (63:25)
61 | processors, 62 | ...payload > 63 | }: ApplyProcessorsParams): boolean => { | ^ 64 | for (const proc of processors) { 65 | // Add deprecation warning for process. 66 | if ((proc as any).process) at Object._raise (/media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/fr

item.title: Cant run package.json scripts
item.dc:creator: mmczaplinski
item.description:
Okay, I believe the error you’re seeing was caused by a bug in @babel/parser: https://github.com/babel/babel/issues/12195.

It has now been fixed by the babel maintainers so please remove your node_modules, yarn / npm install and run your project again!

If you still have any issues do let us know!

Read full topic

item.title: Cant run package.json scripts
item.dc:creator: mmczaplinski
item.description:
Hi @schneider.fei !

Could you run npx frontity info and paste the output here?

There is another user reporting a very similar issue and I’d like to see if depends on system / node version, etc. because I cannot reproduce it locally.

Read full topic

item.title: Cant run package.json scripts
item.dc:creator: schneider.fei
item.description:
Hi.
I was following the documentation to install frontity. After that, when I run npx frontity dev I get this errors:

SERVER STARTED – Listening @ http://localhost:3000

  • mode: development
  • target: module
  • public-path: /static/

Error: ./node_modules/@frontity/core/src/utils/merge-packages.ts
Module build failed (from ./node_modules/babel-loader/lib/index.js):
SyntaxError: /media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/frontity/front/node_modules/@frontity/core/src/utils/merge-packages.ts: Unexpected token (17:18)

15 | packages,
16 | state,

17 | overwriteArrays = false,
| ^
18 | }: {
19 | packages: {
20 | [name: string]: Package | PackageFunction;
at Object._raise (/media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/frontity/front/node_modules/@babel/parser/src/parser/error.js:60:45)
at Object.raiseWithData (/media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/frontity/front/node_modules/@babel/parser/src/parser/error.js:55:17)
at Object.raise (/media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/frontity/front/node_modules/@babel/parser/src/parser/error.js:39:17)
at Object.unexpected (/media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/frontity/front/node_modules/@babel/parser/src/parser/util.js:139:16)
at Object.checkExpressionErrors (/media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/frontity/front/node_modules/@babel/parser/src/parser/util.js:241:12)
at Object.parseParenAndDistinguishExpression (/media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/frontity/front/node_modules/@babel/parser/src/parser/expression.js:1484:10)
at Object.parseExprAtom (/media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/frontity/front/node_modules/@babel/parser/src/parser/expression.js:1071:21)
at Object.parseExprSubscripts (/media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/frontity/front/node_modules/@babel/parser/src/parser/expression.js:563:23)
at Object.parseUpdate (/media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/frontity/front/node_modules/@babel/parser/src/parser/expression.js:543:21)
at Object.parseMaybeUnary (/media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/frontity/front/node_modules/@babel/parser/src/parser/expression.js:527:17)
@ ./node_modules/@frontity/core/src/client/store.ts 1:43-94 1:187-200
@ ./node_modules/@frontity/core/src/client/index.tsx
@ ./build/bundling/entry-points/front/client.ts
@ multi webpack-hot-middleware/client ./build/bundling/entry-points/front/client.ts

./node_modules/@frontity/html2react/src/libraries/component.tsx
Module build failed (from ./node_modules/babel-loader/lib/index.js):
SyntaxError: /media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/frontity/front/node_modules/@frontity/html2react/src/libraries/component.tsx: Unexpected token, expected “;” (63:25)

61 | processors,
62 | …payload

63 | }: ApplyProcessorsParams): boolean => {
| ^
64 | for (const proc of processors) {
65 | // Add deprecation warning for process.
66 | if ((proc as any).process)
at Object._raise (/media/schneider/schneider1/iag/Projetos/fr

Read full topic
